testcase.name: test_partner_login_includes_must_change_password_field

skipped.message: automate-accounts is blocked for partner login (expected)

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_iter135_auth_profile_fixes.py:183: automate-accounts is blocked for partner login (expected)

testcase.name: test_website_settings_get_returns_signup_bullets

failure.message: AssertionError: 'signup_bullet_1' missing from website settings response. Keys: ['settings'] assert 'signup_bullet_1' in {'settings': {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter135_auth_profile_fixes.py:218: in test_website_settings_get_returns_signup_bullets assert field in data, f"'{field}' missing from website settings response. Keys: {list(data.keys())}" E AssertionError: 'signup_bullet_1' missing from website settings response. Keys: ['settings'] E assert 'signup_bullet_1' in {'settings': {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}}

testcase.name: test_website_settings_save_signup_bullets

failure.message: AssertionError: signup_bullet_1 not persisted. Expected 'TEST_bullet_iter135_1', got 'None' assert None == 'TEST_bullet_iter135_1' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdbd2dd34040>('signup_bullet_1') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdbd2dd34040> = {'settings': {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}}.get
